title: Termin Deployment Config
description: Deployment configuration for a Termin application. Provides runtime-specific settings: Channel endpoints, authentication, identity providers, and database configuration. The .termin file declares WHAT exists; this file declares WHERE it connects and HOW it authenticates.

version.description: Schema version for this deployment config.

app_id.description: UUID matching the compiled .termin application. Must match the app_id in the IR.

channels.description: Channel connection configuration. Keys are Channel names matching declarations in the .termin file.

identity.description: Identity provider configuration. Maps to 'Users authenticate with' in the .termin file.

runtime.description: Runtime-specific configuration. Freeform — each runtime defines its own schema. Common keys: database, log_level, port.

migrations.description: v0.9+ schema migration policy. Controls operator-acknowledgment of risky changes, declares field/content rename mappings.

ChannelConfig.description: Connection configuration for a single Channel.

url.description: Base URL for this Channel. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

protocol.description: Transport protocol. 'http' for REST/webhook, 'websocket' for persistent streaming, 'grpc' for gRPC.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for connecting to this Channel.

timeout_ms.description: Request timeout in milliseconds (HTTP/gRPC). Ignored for WebSocket.

retry.description: Retry configuration for failed requests (reliable delivery).

AuthConfig.description: Authentication configuration. All credential values support ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

type.description: Authentication type. 'bearer': Authorization header with token. 'api_key': X-API-Key header. 'mtls': mutual TLS certificates. 'oauth2': OAuth2 client credentials flow. 'hmac': webhook signature verification. 'none': no authentication (internal only).

token.description: Bearer token or API key. Supports ${ENV_VAR}.

header.description: Custom header name for api_key auth.

secret.description: HMAC shared secret for webhook signature verification. Supports ${ENV_VAR}.

backoff_ms.description: Initial backoff interval in milliseconds. Doubles on each retry.

provider.description: Identity provider name matching 'Users authenticate with' in .termin.

config.description: Provider-specific configuration (realm, issuer URL, JWKS endpoint, etc.).

MigrationsConfig.description: v0.9+ schema migration policy. See docs/migration-classifier-design.md for the 5-tier risk model and ack workflow.

accept_any_risky.description: Blanket-accept any low/medium/high-risk migration. Convenient for dev; in prod, prefer per-change fingerprint ack via accepted_changes for audit trail. Cannot bypass blocked classifications — those always refuse.

accepted_changes.description: Per-change fingerprints the operator has reviewed and accepted. Format: <content>.<field>:<change-kind>:<short-hash> for field changes; <content>:<change-kind>:<short-hash> for content changes. The runtime emits the required fingerprints in the deploy-time error when an unack'd risky change is detected; copy them here.

rename_fields.description: Operator-declared field rename mappings. Without these, a remove+add pair in the diff is classified blocked (data loss). With a mapping, the differ folds the pair into a single 'renamed' change and applies via SQL ALTER TABLE RENAME COLUMN (or rebuild + cast for type changes).

rename_contents.description: Operator-declared content (table) rename mappings. Same shape as rename_fields but at the table level.

content.description: Snake_case name of the content type that owns the field.

from.description: Old field name (the snake_case column to rename from).
